objectives.description: Use the past simple tense to describe activities done yesterday
Ask and answer simple questions about daily routines
Express opinions and give reasons using because and so
Read a short paragraph and identify the main idea

items.prompt:
Complete the conversation by filling in the blank with the correct question word.

Maya: "__________ time do you usually wake up in the morning?"
Jake: "I usually wake up at 7 o'clock."

Choose the sentence that correctly uses the past simple tense to describe something done yesterday.

Yesterday, Maya _____ her bicycle to the park.

Read each short paragraph below. Then match each paragraph (1–4) to its main idea (A–D).

**Paragraph 1**
Every morning, Mia feeds her dog, brushes its fur, and takes it for a walk around the block. She also makes sure its water bowl is always full. Mia spends a lot of time making sure her dog is happy and healthy.

**Paragraph 2**
The library has hundreds of books on every subject you can imagine — science, history, adventure, and art. It also has computers, magazines, and quiet tables for studying. You can even borrow DVDs and audiobooks.

**Paragraph 3**
Last summer, our school garden grew tomatoes, sunflowers, and lettuce. Students watered the plants every day and pulled out the weeds. By August, the garden looked amazing.

**Paragraph 4**
Riding a bicycle is good for your body because it builds strong leg muscles. It is also great for the environment since bikes don't produce pollution. Plus, it can be a really fun way to get around town.

---

**Main Ideas**
A. The school garden was a big success thanks to students' hard work.
B. Mia is a responsible and caring pet owner.
C. Cycling has many benefits for people and the planet.
D. A library offers many different resources for learning and entertainment.

options: A. The school garden was a big success thanks to students' hard work.
B. Mia is a responsible and caring pet owner.
C. Cycling has many benefits for people and the planet.
D. A library offers many different resources for learning and entertainment.

items.prompt: Choose the correct question about a daily routine.

options: What time do you wake up?
What time does you wake up?
